title: Highlighted Friends
description: Ever wanted to quickly see if your friends are online? This mod lets you highlight their names in the Tab list with colors and bold text!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Add your friends names via `/highlighted-friends`.
5. Enjoy!
---
### What does the mod do?
* The mod allows you to change the style of player names in the Tab list (Bold, Italic, Underlined)
* Allows you to customise the background color behind your friends' names.
* Saves player's via UUID.
* Adjusts the name if changed.

* Allows multiple groups so you can make "teams" in your Tab list!
---

### Optional:
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

#### Any problems? 
##### Dm me on discord "Nebulajinxed"
